title: Vercel の 429 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article provides generally accurate information and solutions for Vercel 429 errors.

However, the specific claim about the default concurrent execution limit (stated as 12) for projects within a team is outdated and inaccurate according to current Vercel documentation for both builds and function concurrency.
This outdated information could lead to unexpected behavior or resource exhaustion for users relying on the article's details.
freshness score is below the threshold
required_actions: Update the section on '同一チーム内の複数プロジェクトでの同時実行制限の共有' (Sharing Concurrent Execution Limits across Multiple Projects in the Same Team) to reflect current Vercel documentation regarding build and function concurrency limits for different plans.
Clarify whether the mentioned concurrency limit refers to builds or function invocations, as the limits and scaling behaviors differ.
Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.

sources.title: 429 Too Many Requests - HTTP - MDN Web Docs
sources.claim: Vercel の HTTP 429 エラーは、API リクエストがレート制限を超過したことを示すステータスコードです。

sources.title: My website deployed on Vercel keeps giving me the "429: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS" errors. What could be going wrong, how can I debug this? - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: Vercel のサーバーレス関数（Next.js の getServerSideProps など）や CLI ツール、外部 API 連携で過度なリクエストが短時間に発生すると、このエラーが返されます。
